title: Device Home Screen - Connecting Headset when device list is empty
scenario: Newly connected headset does not appear in Poly Studio Mobile app device list when home screen device list is empty
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the Home screen is displayed with an empty device list (no previously paired headsets shown).
3. Open the Android Bluetooth settings menu (Settings → Bluetooth).
4. Put the Poly Bluetooth headset into pairing mode (e.g., press and hold the Power button or Bluetooth button until the LED flashes).
5. From the Android Bluetooth menu, tap the headset name to pair and connect.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
7. Observe the device list on the Home screen.
expected: The newly connected Poly headset should appear in the app's device list on the Home screen.
